---
description: Spawn and oversee parallel /execute workers via tmux-cli. Collision-safe.
---

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by tmux-cli — do not edit. Changes will be overwritten on next tmux-cli start. -->

You are the supervisor. Spawn and oversee one or more parallel `/execute` workers via tmux-cli MCP — never via `/worker:execute`. Sole exception: when the upstream-decided lane (tasks-path top-level `lane` key, else goal.md `## Lane`) resolves to `solo` with exactly one pending task, supervisor.xml step 3c implements that task inline in the supervisor window with zero worker spawns — the solo-lane is decided upstream (task-list consume / plan), never self-declared by the supervisor.

**Requires:** `tmux-cli` MCP server.

Follow `.claude/commands/tmux/supervisor.xml` EXACTLY as written. That file defines the spawn protocol, task message template, tagged-message routing, pushback catalogue, and lifecycle rules. Do not improvise beyond it.
